image:image.image:title: Sujal Wagholikar — Full Stack Developer from Maharashtra, India
image:image.image:caption: Portrait of Sujal Wagholikar, a self-taught full-stack developer specializing in React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Cloudflare Workers, based in Sagroli, Maharashtra, India.

image:image.image:title: All-in-One PDF and Image Toolkit — Browser-based Tool by Sujal Wagholikar
image:image.image:caption: Screenshot of the All-in-One Toolkit web app — a browser-based PDF editor, compressor, and image converter with built-in OCR. Built by Sujal Wagholikar using full-stack JavaScript.

image:image.image:title: All India Voting Portal — National Civic Tech Platform by Sujal Wagholikar
image:image.image:caption: Screenshot of the All India Voting Portal, a national-scale civic technology platform where every Indian can submit opinions on current issues. Built on Cloudflare Workers for edge performance by Sujal Wagholikar.

image:image.image:title: Mock Test Simulator for English Learners — Ed-Tech App by Sujal Wagholikar
image:image.image:caption: Screenshot of the Mock Test Simulator — a professional exam simulator for English learners with timed tests, instant scoring, question banks, and performance analytics. Built with JavaScript by Sujal Wagholikar.
